description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure standing upright on a square plinth. The figure is dressed in a long, flowing garment with detailed folds and appears to be holding a rolled document or scroll in both hands at chest height. The facial features are softly rendered, with the head slightly tilted upward, giving an impression of contemplation or reverence. The back of the sculpture shows the drapery cascading down in naturalistic folds, with the base providing a stable, tiered platform. The material has a uniform, dark brown coloration, suggesting it is cast in bronze or a similar metal. The overall craftsmanship is detailed, with attention to the texture of the clothing and the posture of the figure.
description: A detailed bronze-colored sculpture of a robed human figure holding a scroll, standing on a square plinth with realistic drapery and contemplative expression.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the figure's face, hands holding a scroll, and the detailed folds of the robe.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the scroll held in both hands and the forward-facing posture of the figure.
description_view_2: Left-rear angled view emphasizing the back of the head, the draped robe, and the plinth's shape.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full length of the robe's back and the layered plinth base.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and white.
